scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n shared,server,client -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.db:push: npm run db:start && sleep 2 && npm run db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
